tests.scenario: User tracks a single emotion
steps: Log in to the system with valid credentials
Navigate to the emotion tracking section
Select 'Happy' as the emotion to track
tests.expected_result: The system records 'Happy' with a current timestamp

tests.scenario: User tracks multiple emotions sequentially
steps: Log in to the system with valid credentials
Navigate to the emotion tracking section
Select 'Sad' as the emotion to track
Select 'Excited' as the next emotion to track
tests.expected_result: The system records 'Sad' with a timestamp and then records 'Excited' with a later timestamp

tests.scenario: User views emotional state after tracking for a week
steps: Log in to the system
Track emotions for 7 consecutive days
Navigate to the dashboard
tests.expected_result: The system displays a summary of the user's emotional state for the past week

tests.scenario: User views emotional state with no tracked emotions
steps: Log in to the system
Ensure no emotions have been tracked
Navigate to the dashboard
tests.expected_result: The system does not display a summary of the user's emotional state

tests.scenario: User views monthly patterns and correlations
steps: Log in as a user who has tracked emotions for a month
Navigate to the patterns or insights section
View the displayed patterns and correlations
tests.expected_result: The system displays correlations between emotions and events for the past month.

tests.scenario: User checks for correlations with insufficient data
steps: Log in as a new user
Track emotions for 1 day
Navigate to the patterns or insights section
tests.expected_result: The system does not display correlations between emotions and events due to insufficient data.

tests.scenario: User receives reminder for upcoming tracking goal
steps: Set a tracking goal with a due date for tomorrow
Wait until the system generates reminders for the current day
Check the user's notification inbox
tests.expected_result: The system has sent a reminder notification for the tracking goal due tomorrow

tests.scenario: No reminder sent without a tracking goal
steps: Ensure no tracking goal is set
Wait until the system would normally generate reminders
Check the user's notification inbox
tests.expected_result: No reminder notification is found in the user's inbox

tests.scenario: User receives notifications according to preferences
steps: Set user notification preferences to receive notifications for critical events only
Generate a notification for a non-critical event
Generate a notification for a critical event
tests.expected_result: The system sends a notification for the critical event and does not send a notification for the non-critical event

tests.scenario: User receives no notifications when disabled
steps: Disable all notifications for the user
Generate a notification for a critical event
Generate a notification for a non-critical event
tests.expected_result: The system does not send any notifications for either the critical or non-critical event

tests.scenario: User views reflection after tracking session
steps: Log in as a user
Complete a tracking session with sample data
View the reflection for the completed tracking session
tests.expected_result: The system provides a summary for discussion with a therapist

tests.scenario: User views reflection without tracking session
steps: Log in as a user
Ensure no tracking sessions have been completed
Attempt to view reflection
tests.expected_result: The system does not provide a summary for discussion with a therapist

tests.scenario: Change app language to Spanish
steps: Log in to the app with valid credentials
Navigate to the language settings menu
Select Spanish as the preferred language
tests.expected_result: The app's language is changed to Spanish

tests.scenario: Change app language to English
steps: Log in to the app with valid credentials
Navigate to the language settings menu
Select English as the preferred language
tests.expected_result: The app's language is changed to English

tests.scenario: Valid educational content from credible source
steps: Log in as a registered user
Navigate to the educational content section
Select a content item to view
tests.expected_result: The system displays the content with a clear indication of its credible source.

tests.scenario: Invalid educational content handling
steps: Simulate educational content from a non-credible source
Log in as a registered user
Navigate to the educational content section
Select the simulated content item to view
tests.expected_result: The system does not display the content or clearly indicates it is from an uncredible source.

tests.scenario: User leaves a review and is not prompted again within 30 days
steps: The user leaves a review on the system
The system records the review date as today
The system waits for 29 days
tests.expected_result: The system does not prompt the user to leave another review

tests.scenario: User is prompted for another review after 30 days
steps: The user leaves a review on the system
The system records the review date as today
The system waits for 30 days
tests.expected_result: The system prompts the user to leave another review

tests.scenario: User starts tracking session with clear instructions
steps: The user logs into the system and navigates to the tracking interface
The user initiates a new tracking session
The user observes the tracking interface for guidance
tests.expected_result: The system displays clear instructions on how to proceed with the tracking session

tests.scenario: User interacts with tracking interface with minimal distractions
steps: The user is in an active tracking session
The user interacts with various elements of the tracking interface (e.g., buttons, charts)
The user assesses the interface for distractions
tests.expected_result: The system maintains a minimalistic interface with no pop-ups, ads, or unnecessary notifications during the tracking session

tests.scenario: User successfully tracks their mood and thoughts
steps: The user logs into the system
The user starts a new tracking session
The user enters their current mood as 'happy' and their thoughts as 'I am feeling good today'
The user saves the tracking entry
tests.expected_result: The system records the user's mood as 'happy', their thoughts as 'I am feeling good today', and includes a timestamp for when the entry was saved.

tests.scenario: User tracks with minimal input
steps: The user logs into the system
The user starts a new tracking session
The user enters their current mood as 'neutral' with no thoughts
The user saves the tracking entry
tests.expected_result: The system records the user's mood as 'neutral', no thoughts entered, and includes a timestamp for when the entry was saved.

tests.scenario: User completes reflection session and views insights with emotional support suggestions
steps: Log in as a user
Complete a reflection session with sample inputs
View insights from the reflection session
tests.expected_result: The system provides suggestions for emotional support

tests.scenario: User views insights without completing a reflection session
steps: Log in as a user
Navigate to insights page without completing a reflection session
tests.expected_result: The system does not provide suggestions for emotional support

tests.scenario: User generates and shares a report with a professional
steps: Log in to the app as a user
Generate a report within the app
Share the report with a professional
tests.expected_result: The report is successfully exported and shared with the professional

tests.scenario: User attempts to export report without generating it
steps: Log in to the app as a user
Try to share a non-existent report with a professional
tests.expected_result: The system prevents sharing and prompts the user to generate a report first

tests.scenario: Access to basic insights with free account
steps: Create a new user account with free subscription plan
Log in to the system with the free account credentials
Navigate to the user's results page
tests.expected_result: The system displays basic insights without prompting for subscription upgrade

tests.scenario: No access restriction to basic results for free users
steps: Log in to the system with an existing free account
Navigate to the results section
Verify that all basic insights are accessible
tests.expected_result: The system does not restrict access to basic insights and does not require payment for viewing them

tests.scenario: Valid user expressing emotions
steps: Log in to the system with valid credentials
Navigate to the emotions expression feature
Enter and submit emotional content
tests.expected_result: The emotional content is encrypted and not shared with third parties

tests.scenario: Logged-in user attempting to access another user's emotional content
steps: Log in to the system with valid credentials of another user
Attempt to access or view the first user's emotional content
tests.expected_result: The system prevents access to the first user's emotional content, ensuring it remains private
